The '''D'Astan starfighter''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] design used by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Ragez D'Asta]]'s private fleet. This force composed the largest privately owned starfighter fleet in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

[[File:DAstaStarfightersTopView-CouncilOfBlood6.jpg|thumb|left|100px|Fighters above [[Ord Cantrell/Legends|Ord Cantrell]]]]

It was armed with one very large [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] and one smaller laser cannon in the nose, and was propelled by three sublight engines mounted on small aft wings. The D'Astan starfighter was a rather fast craft, capable of outrunning a [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]] in atmospheric flight. This fighter design was instrumental in Baron D'Asta's assault on the estate of self-proclaimed [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Xandel Carivus]] in the [[Battle of Ord Cantrell]].

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 6|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 6]] {{1st}}
